title: RGB texture pack
description: A texture pack that turns every light into RGB.
body:
# RGB texture pack [![Discord][img-discord]][url-discord] [![GitHub][img-github]][url-github] [![Modrinth][img-modrinth]][url-modrinth]
Have you ever found yourself looking more a more colorful Minecraft experience ? Looking for more interesting lights sources ? I got you covered ! Introducing the RGB texture pack (cool name not included), that turns any light into RGB. ## Included blocks - Rgb texture for lights
- Sea lantern - Glow item frame - Redstone lamp (on) - Torches - Lanterns - Froglights - End rods - Beacons - Shroomlight - Magma blocks - Copper bulbs - Jack o' lantern
- If you want to add a new block please or open [an issue](https://github.com/Valdr687/RGB-Texture-pack/issues). ### Preview Special thanks goes to my friend zozo_mrcf for the original ~~idea~~ joke ! ## License This work is licensed under a Attribution-ShareAlike 4.0 International License.
